match.userMessage:
A cinematic establishing shot for "Untitled Sequence". Opening scene: FADE IN:

INT. BONDI STUDIO - MORNING

Bright window light cuts across a white vanity. SCARLETT, 19, sun-kissed blonde, sits before her microphone. She lifts a matte white box, fingers tracing the coral accent. The lid slides open to reveal the lipstick nestled in linen.

CLOSE ON: fingertips press the bullet, its creamy coral surface catching a sharp flash of direct light.

SCARLETT (V.O.)
One shade. One summer.

EXT. BONDI BEACH PROMENADE - CONTINUOUS

Handheld, Scarlett walks the rail, hair l Art style: Modern social-first product photography with tactile, editorial energy. Products shown in real-life context -- hands opening packaging, fingers pressing textures, products on bathroom shelves, kitchen counters, rumpled linen. Close-up detail shots emphasize material and finish. Flat-lays with curated minimal arrangements. Color-matched backgrounds that complement the product. Every frame feels like something you would screenshot and save. Mood: Fresh, sensory, and effortlessly cool. Lighting: Bright natural window light with clean directional shadows. Direct on-camera flash for punchy editorial energy on select shots. No heavy diffusion -- let light feel real and immediate. Warm late-afternoon glow for lifestyle moments. High-key and airy overall with pops of contrast. No text, no titles, no subtitles, no watermarks, no letters, no words, no signs, no UI elements.
